aiIntegration.label: Custom Local AI Integration
aiIntegration.heroTitle: Transform your business with privacy-first AI solutions that run on your own servers

benefits.title: Complete Data Privacy
benefits.text: Your data never leaves your servers. Full control and compliance with GDPR, HIPAA, and local regulations.

benefits.title: Lightning Fast Performance
benefits.text: No internet dependency. Process thousands of requests per second with local AI models.

benefits.title: Cost Effective
benefits.text: No monthly API fees. One-time setup with unlimited usage on your infrastructure.
